summary: Extended kind-9 receive handler in MarmotContext.tsx to call parseImageMessageContent+getMediaAttachments and populate ChatMessage.attachments from rumor.tags when content is type:'image'. Extended parseStructured in GroupChat.tsx with image discriminator. Added ImageMessageBubble dispatch in render loop. Created useDecryptedImage hook: mediaPersistence cache-first, then blossomGet+decryptMedia+setBlob on miss; in-flight deduplication; states: loading/ready/decrypt-failed/not-found. Created ImageMessageBubble with image-blurhash-placeholder, image-thumbnail, image-decrypt-failed, image-unavailable, image-caption testids. Created ImageLightbox stub (full implementation in story-08). 8 unit tests pass.
